title: 3 REIT Stocks in Chris Davis' Portfolio Reach 52-Week Lows
text: With only a little over a month left in what has been a turbulent year, a handful of stocks in Chris Davis (Trades, Portfolio)' equity portfolio are trading near their 52-week lows as the market continues to adjust to rising inflation and interest rate hikes, among other geopolitical conflicts.

title: 12 Potent Picks Are December's Ideal Dividend Buys
text: A February 2, 2022, Kiplinger Today special report headlined, "Potent Picks to Profit in 2022,” featured 97 dividend-fetching stocks from 118 in that article. Here is YCharts 11/25/22 update. Article titles were: '65 Best Dividends', '15 Value Stocks', '15 Best Mid-Caps', '10 European Plays', '9 High Yields', '6 Sturdy Defensive Stocks.'

title: My Best Dividend Aristocrats For December 2022
text: NOBL gained 10.31% in October, which brings the Fund's return for the year to a loss of 8.96%. Thus far this month, through November 22nd, the dividend aristocrat ETF is up 6.52%, bringing its year-to-date return to -3.03%.

title: Can Apartment REITs Handle Higher Interest Expense?
text: Some REITs will see far more pressure on AFFO per share going into 2023. We dug through the debts for each REIT and prepared a model for the impact of higher rates.

title: These Were The Five Best- And Worst-Performing Real Estate Stocks In October 2022
text: Real estate stocks help investors insulate their portfolio against rising inflation.

title: Walgreens Named November Aristocrats Top Dog
text: "Dividend Aristocrats in the S&P 500 Index have raised their annual payouts every year for at least 25 consecutive years." - Kiplinger.com/Investing. 65 Aristocrats screened as of November 8, 2022 represented all eleven Morningstar sectors. Broker-estimated top-ten net gains ranged 11.21%-36.63%, topped by MDT & ESS.

title: Apartments In Free Fall, So I Bought Essex
text: We picked up 49 shares of ESS at $208.60. The technical factors suggest we may be early to catch the falling knife, but the fundamentals look good.
